description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master and tags starting with 'v*', and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, macOS-10.15) and architectures (x64, x86 on Windows). For each job, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, configure and build a project using cmake, run tests with ctest, package with cpack, and perform additional Python tasks. When a tag is pushed, create a draft pre-release and upload a release asset.
